name: Breanna Heim x Hot on the Case

episodes.title: Doomsday Cult Couple Kills Their Families.. The Vallow-Daybell Cult Murders
episodes.description: In this week's investigation Hot On The Case is diving into the shocking case of Lori Vallow and Chad Daybell, a story that captivated the nation and left countless questions in its wake. What began as a seemingly ordinary family soon unraveled into a complex case involving multiple missing children, unusual religious beliefs, suspicious deaths, and a web of deception that stretched across multiple states.

episodes.title: The FBI Top 10 Most Wanted Cult Leader With 78 Wives
episodes.description:
In this weeks' investigation, Hot On The Case dives into the crimes behind the subjects of two Netflix true crime docuseries, Trust Me: The False Prophet, and Keep Sweet Pray and Obey. This episode explores the rise and control of FLDS leader Warren Jeffs, and the disturbing actions of Samuel Bateman. Uncovering how power, manipulation, and blind faith shaped their communities.

This content is created for educational and documentary purposes. My channel focuses on factual, responsible true crime storytelling with respect for victims and their families. All information is presented to inform, raise awareness, and examine the psychological and legal aspects of criminal cases, not to glorify violence or perpetrators.

This video contains commentary, criticism, and educational analysis of publicly reported events. Any news clips, body cam footage, interrogation footage, photographs, or media excerpts used are included under Fair Use for purposes of reporting, commentary, and documentary storytelling. All rights belong to their respective owners. No copyright infringement is intended.

episodes.title: How A Cult Drove This Mother To Kill Her 5 Children
episodes.description: In this episode, we take a deep dive into the tragic and complex case of Andrea Yates and the Yates family.. A story that shocked the nation and sparked intense debate about a variety of factors including an alleged cult, the struggles of motherhood, and the importance of mental health.

episodes.title: This Cult Kidnapped Mothers & Stole Babies - Anne Hamilton Byrne & "The Family"
episodes.description:
In this week’s episode of Hot on the Case, we dive into the twisted true story of Anne Hamilton-Byrne, the glamorous, delusional cult leader who convinced her followers she was the reincarnation of Jesus Christ. But her power didn’t stop at brainwashing adults… she stole dozens of children.

From forged adoption papers and psychedelic fueled mind control to “siblings” raised in isolation, The Family was one of the most bizarre and disturbing cults in Australian history.

This week we investigate how Anne built her empire of lies, manipulated desperate mothers, and created a fake family in the name of spiritual salvation.

#TrueCrime
